mapper.select: SELECT w.*, p.product_name FROM work_orders w LEFT JOIN products p ON w.product_id = p.product_id ORDER BY w.start_date DESC, w.work_order_id DESC
SELECT w.*, p.product_name FROM work_orders w LEFT JOIN products p ON w.product_id = p.product_id WHERE w.work_order_id = #{workOrderId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO work_orders (product_id, quantity, start_date, status) VALUES (#{productId}, #{quantity}, #{startDate}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE work_orders SET status = #{status} WHERE work_order_id = #{workOrderId}
